copilot_impact: Sensitivity labels only protect data once applied. Labels that are configured but never applied leave Copilot-accessible content unprotected.
impact: Sensitivity labels only protect data once applied. Labels that are configured but never applied leave Copilot-accessible content unprotected.
remediation_steps: Publish sensitivity labels in the Microsoft Purview portal (Information Protection > Labels).

Create a label policy that applies a default label and/or auto-labelling so labels are actually applied to Microsoft 365 groups, Teams, SharePoint sites and content — configuring a label is not enough; it must be applied.
title: Remediate Information Protection Labels applied

remediation_steps: Publish sensitivity labels in the Microsoft Purview portal (Information Protection > Labels).

copilot_impact: Without device compliance policies, enrolled devices are never evaluated and device-based Conditional Access cannot protect Copilot-accessible content.
impact: Without device compliance policies, enrolled devices are never evaluated and device-based Conditional Access cannot protect Copilot-accessible content.
remediation_steps: In the Microsoft Intune admin center go to Devices > Compliance policies and create at least one policy per platform (Windows, iOS/iPadOS, Android, macOS).
Require compliant devices via a Conditional Access grant control so non-compliant devices cannot reach Microsoft 365 Copilot data.
title: Configure Microsoft Intune device compliance policies
